description: LLM-assisted card evaluation functions for bot AI (auto-generated + manual)

Apprentice Wizard.priority: high early game for Genesis card draw, moderate otherwise

Blood Ravens.priority: high when low on life or opponent has ground-only blockers
Blood Ravens.rulesText:
Airborne

Damage dealt by Blood Ravens' strikes heals you.

Candlemas Monks.priority: high when needing emergency phase skip, moderate otherwise
Candlemas Monks.rulesText: Deathrite → Proceed to the end phase.

Cloud Spirit.priority: early game evasive threat with mobility

Daperyll Vampire.priority: moderate to high - evasive threat that provides life gain
Daperyll Vampire.rulesText:
Airborne

Damage dealt by Daperyll Vampire's strikes heals you.

Dead of Night Demon.priority: moderate - efficient early stealth minion for evasive damage

East-West Dragon.priority: good midrange flyer with unique sideways movement ability

Grim Reaper.priority: high when opponent has important minions or multiple copies of threats
Grim Reaper.rulesText:
Lethal

Whenever Grim Reaper kills a minion, banish that minion and all copies. Search its owner's cemetery, hand, and spellbook and banish any copies. They shuffle.

Gyre Hippogriffs.priority: high - efficient flying attacker with immediate impact due to charge

Haast Eagle.priority: good aggressive flyer that can transport other units
Haast Eagle.rulesText:
Airborne

May carry a weaker allied minion.

Headless Haunt.priority: high - above rate stats with evasion and mobility
Headless Haunt.rulesText:
Voidwalk

At the start of your turn, Headless Haunt teleports to the top of a random site or void.

Highland Clansmen.priority: high when you can attack immediately due to Charge

Highland Falconer.priority: high early game for tutoring small flying units
Highland Falconer.rulesText: Genesis → You may search your hand and spellbook for a Beast with Airborne and mana cost ② or less and summon it here. Shuffle if needed.

Highland Princess.priority: high early game for artifact tutoring, moderate later
Highland Princess.rulesText: Genesis → Search your spellbook for an artifact that costs ① or less, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle.

Hounds of Ondaros.priority: high when opponent has stealth units or multiple threats to navigate
Hounds of Ondaros.rulesText:
Airborne, Burrowing, Submerge, Voidwalk

Nearby enemies permanently lose Stealth.

Kite Archer.priority: good early game ranged unit with mobility
Kite Archer.rulesText:
Ranged

Immediately after performing a ranged strike, Kite Archer may take a step.

Lord of the Void.priority: high - potent mana denial through site removal
Lord of the Void.rulesText:
Voidwalk

At the end of your turn, Lord of the Void may banish an adjacent site, unless there's an Avatar there.

Men of Leng.priority: early game discard pressure, especially when opponent has cards
Men of Leng.rulesText: Whenever Men of Leng strike an Avatar, that Avatar discards a random card.

Midnight Rogue.priority: moderate - evasive threat with stealth and ranged

Moon Clan Werewolf.evaluationFunction: const mortals = context.myUnits.filter(u => u.keywords.includes('Mortal')); const hasMortalToSac = mortals.length > 0; const value = 6.0 + (hasMortalToSac ? 2.0 : 0) + (context.underPressure ? -1.0 : 0) + (context.myHandSize > 1 ? 1.0 : -1.0); return context.manaLeftover >= 0 ? Math.min(10, Math.max(0, value)) : 0;
Moon Clan Werewolf.priority: high when you have expendable Mortals and another copy in hand
Moon Clan Werewolf.rulesText: Sacrifice an allied Mortal → Summon Moon Clan Werewolf from your hand to the Mortal's location.

Nightmare.priority: high when opponent has multiple units to disrupt
Nightmare.rulesText: At the end of your turn, for each enemy minion here, you may push it to an adjacent location or void.

Nimbus Jinn.priority: high when you have spells to discard and opposing units to target
Nimbus Jinn.rulesText:
Airborne

Discard a spell → Deal 3 damage to another random unit here.

Palliburrie Bats.priority: good early game evasive threat, better against ground-based opponents

Peregrine Apparition.priority: high when opponent lacks flying blockers or when evasion is needed

Phantasmal Shade.priority: high when opponent has no units or no attackers, moderate otherwise
Phantasmal Shade.rulesText: When Phantasmal Shade is struck, destroy it.

Phantom Steed.priority: high when you have other minions to carry, moderate otherwise
Phantom Steed.rulesText:
Movement +2, Voidwalk

May carry an allied minion.

Phase Assassin.priority: good early game threat that can trade well due to Voidwalk and Stealth recursion
Phase Assassin.rulesText:
Voidwalk

Whenever Phase Assassin enters the void, he gains Stealth.

Plumed Pegasus.priority: good early-mid game flyer, especially against ground units

Puppet Master.priority: high when opponent has multiple tapped units, especially strong ones
Puppet Master.rulesText:
Airborne

Genesis → Gain control of all tapped minions here until Puppet Master leaves the realm.

Recurring Specter.priority: moderate - recurring threat that can be recast from cemetery
Recurring Specter.rulesText:
Can't defend.

May be cast from your cemetery.

Riddle Sphinx.priority: moderate - evasive threat with card selection/draw
Riddle Sphinx.rulesText:
Airborne

Genesis → Look at your topmost spell. You may put it on the bottom of your spellbook, then an opponent may exchange your top and bottommost spells. Draw a card.

Roaming Monster.priority: flexible defender that can be placed anywhere to counter threats
Roaming Monster.rulesText: May be summoned to any site.

Skirmishers of Mu.priority: higher when opponent has units due to ranged strike mobility
Skirmishers of Mu.rulesText:
Ranged

During basic movement, Skirmishers of Mu may perform a ranged strike from any location along their path.

Sky Baron.evaluationFunction: const oppAirborne = context.oppUnits.filter(u => u.keywords.includes('Airborne')).length; const myAirborne = context.myUnits.filter(u => u.keywords.includes('Airborne')).length - 1; return context.manaLeftover >= 0 ? (6.0 + (oppAirborne * 0.75) - (myAirborne * 0.5)) : 0.0;
Sky Baron.priority: high when opponent has airborne threats, moderate otherwise
Sky Baron.rulesText:
Airborne

All other minions lose Airborne.

Snow Leopard.priority: high early game - efficient 2/2 for 1 mana

Spectral Stalker.priority: high early game - efficient voidwalking unit

Spire Lich.evaluationFunction: const onTower = context.myUnits.some(u => u.name === 'Spire Lich' && u.keywords.includes('Tower')); return context.manaLeftover >= 0 ? (onTower ? 7.5 : 4.0) : 0.0;
Spire Lich.priority: high when played on a Tower, moderate otherwise
Spire Lich.rulesText: If Spire Lich is atop a Tower, it has +2 power, Ranged, and Spellcaster.

Ultimate Horror.priority: high when multiple Voidwalk minions have died
Ultimate Horror.rulesText:
Airborne, Voidwalk

Genesis → Summon each other dead Voidwalk minion to a nearby site or void.

Vril Revenant.evaluationFunction: let score = 5.0; if (context.myMana >= 2) { score += 0.5 * context.turn; if (context.isMyTurn) { score += 1.0; } if (context.oppUnits.length > 0 && context.oppUnits.some(u => u.hp <= 1)) { score += 2.0; } if (context.lethalThreat) { score -= 2.0; } } return Math.min(Math.max(score, 0), 10);
Vril Revenant.priority: early game evasive threat that scales with available mana
Vril Revenant.rulesText:
Voidwalk

① → Gain +1 power this turn.

Wind Sylph.priority: early game flyer with utility, better with magic spells in hand
Wind Sylph.rulesText:
Airborne, Air Spellcaster

After Wind Sylph casts a Magic spell, she may push a unit here one step.

Witherwing Hero.evaluationFunction: const baseScore = 6.5; const hasWeakerAllies = context.myUnits.some(u => u.atk < 4 && u.hp < 4); const airScore = context.oppUnits.filter(u => u.keywords.includes('Flying')).length > 0 ? 1 : 0.5; const protectionValue = hasWeakerAllies ? 1.5 : 0; return context.manaLeftover >= 0 ? Math.min(10, baseScore + airScore + protectionValue) : 0;
Witherwing Hero.priority: good stats for cost, protects weaker units, answers flying threats
Witherwing Hero.rulesText:
Airborne

Whenever a weaker allied minion here is attacked, you may return it to its owner's hand.

Zephyranne Airship.priority: higher with ground units to transport or when needing evasive threats
Zephyranne Airship.rulesText:
Airborne, Movement +2

May carry any number of allied minions.

Blink.priority: high when repositioning units for defense or attack, plus card draw
Blink.rulesText: An ally teleports to a location it’s nearby. Draw a card.

Browse.priority: high - card selection and quality improvement
Browse.rulesText: Look at your next seven spells. Put one in your hand and the rest on the bottom of your spellbook in any order.

Chain Lightning.priority: high when opponent has multiple units in proximity
Chain Lightning.rulesText: Deal 2 damage to target unit nearby. Any number of times, you may spend ② to additionally target a new unit nearby the previous one.

Chaos Twister.evaluationFunction: return Math.max(0, Math.min(10, context.oppUnits.reduce((value, unit) => { const highPowerTarget = context.myUnits.find(u => u.atk >= 4); return highPowerTarget ? Math.max(value, Math.min(8.5, (unit.atk + unit.hp)/2 + highPowerTarget.atk/2)) : 2.0; }, 2.0)));
Chaos Twister.priority: high when you have a high-power unit and opponent has clustered units
Chaos Twister.rulesText: Place target minion on the back of your hand, then blow it off from a height of at least one foot. Deal damage equal to its power to each unit atop the site it lands on, including itself.

Disenchant.evaluationFunction: let targets = context.oppUnits.filter(u => u.keywords.includes('Aura')).length + context.oppUnits.filter(u => u.keywords.includes('Artifact')).length; return targets > 1 ? 8.0 : (targets === 1 ? 6.0 : 2.0);
Disenchant.priority: high when opponent has multiple auras/artifacts, low otherwise
Disenchant.rulesText: Destroy all auras and artifacts at target location up to two steps away.

Dream-Quest.priority: high when you have a Spellcaster and need specific cards
Dream-Quest.rulesText: An allied Spellcaster falls asleep and is disabled until hurt. At the start of your next turn, if it's still asleep, you may wake it up to search your spellbook for a card and put it into your hand. Shuffle if needed.

Fade.priority: high when an allied unit is occupying an enemy site for card draw
Fade.rulesText: Give an allied minion Stealth. If it occupies an enemy site, draw a card.

Flanking Maneuver.priority: high when multiple units can be repositioned advantageously, moderate for card draw alone
Flanking Maneuver.rulesText: Teleport any number of allies at one location to another location a chess knight's move away. Draw a card.

Grapple Shot.priority: high when you have untapped units and opponent has valuable targets
Grapple Shot.rulesText: An ally shoots a projectile. If it hits a unit, the ally is dragged to that location, and may strike the hit unit.

Lightning Bolt.evaluationFunction: return context.oppUnitCount === 0 ? 1.0 : (context.oppUnits.some(u => u.hp <= 3 && (u.atk >= 4 || u.keywords.includes('Flying') || u.keywords.includes('Lethal'))) ? 8.0 : (context.oppTotalATK > context.myTotalATK ? 6.5 : 5.0));
Lightning Bolt.priority: high when opponent has dangerous units with 3 or less HP
Lightning Bolt.rulesText: Deal 3 damage to a random unit at target location.

Mortality.evaluationFunction: const mortalTargets = context.oppUnits.filter(u => !u.keywords.includes('Immortal')); return mortalTargets.length === 0 ? 1.0 : (mortalTargets.length >= 2 ? 8.0 : (context.oppTotalATK > context.myTotalATK ? 7.0 : 5.0));
Mortality.priority: high when opponent has multiple mortal units or threatening mortal units
Mortality.rulesText: Kill all Mortal minions at target location up to two steps away.

Occult Ritual.priority: high when multiple spellcasters are on board, generates mana advantage
Occult Ritual.rulesText: Gain (2) this turn for each allied Spellcaster nearby.

Psionic Blast.priority: high when opponent has multiple units, especially threatening ones
Psionic Blast.rulesText: Deal 1 damage to each minion here. They're disabled until your next turn.

Rain of Arrows.evaluationFunction: const oppAboveground = context.oppUnits.filter(u => !u.keywords.includes('Burrowing')).length; const myAboveground = context.myUnits.filter(u => !u.keywords.includes('Burrowing')).length; return oppAboveground === 0 ? 1.0 : (oppAboveground > myAboveground ? 7.0 : (oppAboveground > 2 ? 6.0 : 4.0));
Rain of Arrows.priority: high when opponent has multiple aboveground units, especially if you have few
Rain of Arrows.rulesText: Deal 1 damage to each aboveground minion.

Raise Dead.priority: moderate - value increases when units have died and behind on board

Recall.priority: high when multiple units need repositioning or are tapped, especially under pressure
Recall.rulesText: Teleport any number of allied minions to the caster’s location.

Telekinesis.priority: high when valuable artifacts are present on board
Telekinesis.rulesText: Caster snatches and picks up target nearby artifact they can carry.

Teleport.priority: high when saving valuable units from lethal damage or repositioning for tactical advantage
Teleport.rulesText: Teleport an ally to the surface of target site.

Unlikely Alliance.evaluationFunction: const rarityCounts = new Set(context.myUnits.map(u => u.name.toLowerCase().includes('mythic') ? 'mythic' : u.name.toLowerCase().includes('rare') ? 'rare' : u.name.toLowerCase().includes('uncommon') ? 'uncommon' : 'common')).size; return context.myUnitCount > 0 ? Math.min(2.0 + (rarityCounts * 2.0), 8.0) : 1.0;
Unlikely Alliance.priority: high when you have multiple units of different rarities
Unlikely Alliance.rulesText: Draw a card for each rarity among allied minions.

Waypoint Portal.priority: high when you have multiple units and need tactical advantage
Waypoint Portal.rulesText: Choose two different sites. This turn, units can move between them as if they were adjacent.

Whirling Blades.evaluationFunction: const bestUnit = context.myUnits.sort((a,b) => b.atk - a.atk)[0]; const potentialKills = context.oppUnits.filter(u => !u.keywords.includes('Flying')).length; return !bestUnit ? 0.0 : (potentialKills >= 2 ? 8.5 : (potentialKills === 1 ? 6.5 : 3.0)) + (context.nearLethal ? 1.0 : 0);
Whirling Blades.priority: high when multiple ground enemies are lined up, or when pushing for lethal
Whirling Blades.rulesText: An ally may take up to two steps, and then strikes each enemy along their entire path.

Windblast.priority: high when disrupting opponent's board position or avoiding lethal
Windblast.rulesText: Push everything atop sites one step in a cardinal direction.

Evil Presence.priority: high when you have spirit cards in hand or need recurring value
Evil Presence.rulesText: You may summon Spirits to affected sites. When you summon a Spirit here, give it Charge, and return Evil Presence to its owner's hand.

Summoning Sphere.priority: high when you have minions in hand and multiple sites
Summoning Sphere.rulesText: You may summon minions to affected sites.

Thunderstorm.priority: high when opponent has multiple units or threatening units
Thunderstorm.rulesText: At the end of your turn, deal 3 damage to a random unit atop affected sites, then you may move Thunderstorm one step. After it deals damage three times, dispel it.

Wall of Air.priority: high when opponent has multiple small/flying units
Wall of Air.rulesText:
Conjure atop the border of a site you control.

Minions with Airborne or 2 or less power can't traverse Wall of Air.

Albespine Pikemen.priority: good early-mid game attacker due to first strike

Älvalinne Dryads.priority: high early game for mana acceleration

Amazon Warriors.priority: high - efficient stats for cost, good midgame threat

Atlas Wanderers.priority: high when rearranging board position is advantageous
Atlas Wanderers.rulesText: Genesis → This site and an adjacent site change places, carrying along everything of normal size.

Autumn Unicorn.priority: high early game - efficient stats for cost

Belmotte Longbowmen.priority: good early-mid game unit with Ranged ability

Bone Rabble.priority: high in earth decks, value increases with more sites
Bone Rabble.rulesText: Whenever you play an earth site, you may summon Bone Rabble from your cemetery to that site.

Bosk Troll.priority: high early game - efficient 3/3 for 2 mana

Cave Trolls.priority: solid defensive unit with Burrowing for protection

Conqueror Worm.priority: high in late game when opponent has few/no units to contest sites
Conqueror Worm.rulesText: At the end of your turn, if no enemy units occupy this site, permanently gain control of it.

Dalcean Phalanx.priority: high - efficient defensive body with good stats for cost

Dwarven Digging Team.priority: good early game unit that gets better with other minions
Dwarven Digging Team.rulesText:
Burrowing

Allied minions occupying nearby sites have Burrowing.

Frontier Settlers.priority: high early game for mana acceleration
Frontier Settlers.rulesText: Tap → Reveal the topmost site of your atlas. Play it adjacent to Frontier Settlers, if able, and they move there. They lose this ability.

Gneissgnath Gnomes.priority: early game 1-drop that can avoid removal via burrowing
Gneissgnath Gnomes.rulesText:
Burrowing

At the end of your turn, Gneissgnath Gnomes may burrow.

Grey Wolves.evaluationFunction: const nearbyWolves = context.myUnits.filter(u => u.name === 'Grey Wolves').length; return context.manaLeftover >= 0 ? Math.min(3.0 + (nearbyWolves * 2), 8.0) : 0.0;
Grey Wolves.priority: high when multiple Grey Wolves are in play, moderate otherwise
Grey Wolves.rulesText:
Your spellbook may include any number of Grey Wolves.

Has +1 power for each other Grey Wolves nearby.

House Arn Bannerman.priority: higher value when you have other untapped units that can benefit from the power buff

King of the Realm.evaluationFunction: const mortalsInPlay = context.oppUnits.filter(u => !u.keywords.includes('Immortal')).length + context.myUnits.filter(u => !u.keywords.includes('Immortal')).length; const controlValue = context.oppUnits.filter(u => !u.keywords.includes('Immortal')).length * 1.5; return context.manaLeftover >= 0 ? Math.min(10, 5.0 + mortalsInPlay * 0.5 + controlValue) : 0;
King of the Realm.priority: high when opponent has valuable mortal units to steal
King of the Realm.rulesText:
Other Mortals have +1 power.

You control all Mortals.

Land Surveyor.priority: high early game for site acceleration, moderate otherwise for card advantage

Mage Slayer.priority: high when opponent has a Spellcaster, moderate otherwise
Mage Slayer.rulesText: Genesis → Kill target Spellcaster minion nearby.

Master Tracker.evaluationFunction: const stealthUnits = context.oppUnits.filter(u => u.keywords.includes('Stealth')).length; return Math.min(10, 4.0 + (stealthUnits * 2.0) + (context.manaLeftover >= 0 ? 1.0 : -10.0));
Master Tracker.priority: high when opponent has stealth units, moderate otherwise

Midland Army.evaluationFunction: const baseValue = 6.5; const statValue = context.manaLeftover >= 0 ? 1.0 : 0.0; const aoeDamageValue = context.oppUnitCount > 0 ? 1.0 : 0.0; const deathValue = 0.5; return Math.min(10, baseValue + statValue + aoeDamageValue + (context.underPressure ? deathValue : 0));
Midland Army.priority: high - strong stats with board control ability and death effect
Midland Army.rulesText:
Tap → Target a location up to three steps away. Deal 4 damage to each unit there.

Deathrite → Summon a Foot Soldier token to each adjacent location.

Monastery Gargoyle.evaluationFunction: const baseValue = 5.0; const flyingNeeded = context.oppUnits.some(u => u.keywords.includes('Flying')); const artifactValue = context.oppUnits.some(u => u.keywords.includes('Deathtouch') || u.atk >= 3); return context.manaLeftover >= 0 ? baseValue + (flyingNeeded ? 1.5 : 0) + (artifactValue ? 1.5 : 0) + (context.underPressure ? 1.0 : 0) : 0;
Monastery Gargoyle.priority: moderate - flexible unit that can adapt to threats
Monastery Gargoyle.rulesText: At the start and end of your turn, choose whether Monastery Gargoyle has Airborne or is a non-minion artifact.

Monster Hunter.evaluationFunction: const nearbyMonsters = context.oppUnits.filter(u => u.keywords.includes('Monster')).length; return context.manaLeftover >= 0 ? (nearbyMonsters > 0 ? 8.0 : 3.5) : 0.0;
Monster Hunter.priority: high when opponent has Monsters, low otherwise

Mordric Druids.priority: higher when under pressure from opponent's attackers
Mordric Druids.rulesText:
Spellcaster

Whenever you lose life due to an undefended attack nearby, the attacker's controller also loses that much life.

Mountain Giant.priority: high - powerful late game threat that occupies multiple locations

Pudge Butcher.priority: high when opponent has ground units that can be pulled and fought
Pudge Butcher.rulesText:
Immobile

Tap → Shoot a projectile. If it hits a unit, drag it to this location. Pudge may fight it.

Root Spider.priority: high when opponent has units to disable, moderate otherwise
Root Spider.rulesText:
Burrowing

While Root Spider is burrowed, minions directly above it are disabled.

13 Treasures of Britain.rulesText: When picked up, bearer's controller draws a card. Teleport the Treasures to the top of a random site or void.

A Midsummer Night's Dream.rulesText: Mortals here are disabled and each give +1 power to all Faeries here. Dispel if there are no Faeries here.

Aaj-kegon Ghost Crabs.rulesText:
Submerge, Voidwalk

Has +1 power for each void in their row.

Abaddon Succubus.priority: high when opponent has board presence
Abaddon Succubus.rulesText: Once on your turn, may lure target adjacent enemy minion to take a step closer. When it arrives, it takes 2 damage and you heal 2.

Abundance.rulesText: Each affected site provides one additional mana.

Abyssal Assault.priority: high when opponent has board presence
Abyssal Assault.rulesText: For each point of its power, an allied Monster may deal 1 damage to a unit in a square near it.

Accursed Albatross.rulesText:
Airborne
 
When a unit kills Accursed Albatross, kill that unit's other allied minions it's nearby.

Accursed Desert.priority: good early game tempo, ETB value on play

Accursed Tower.priority: good early game tempo, ETB value on play

Accusation.rulesText: Target opponent reveals their hand and banishes a card. If any of their cards or allies are Evil, you may choose which.

Acid Rain.rulesText: Silence affected sites and artifacts there.

Adept Illusionist.priority: high for card advantage, good for board development, good early game tempo
Adept Illusionist.rulesText:
Spellcaster

Tap → Search your hand, cemetery, or spellbook for another Adept Illusionist and summon it nearby. Shuffle if needed.

Adtonitum.priority: high when opponent has board presence, late game finisher
Adtonitum.rulesText:
Airborne, Movement +1

Whenever Adtonitum stops, she may deal 3 damage to another random unit there.

Aethermoeba.rulesText:
Voidwalk

Moves by expanding from any part of itself. It occupies all locations it has ever occupied, and has +1 power for each one that is void.

Aino.rulesText: At the end of your turn, Aino may take a step between the top and bottom edges of the realm to gain Stealth.

Alabaster Box.rulesText: Whenever a minion dies nearby, you heal 1.

Algae Bloom.priority: good early game tempo, ETB value on play

Algor Omphalos.priority: high for card advantage, good for board development
Algor Omphalos.rulesText:
Earth and Water Spellcaster

At the end of your turn, this Omphalos draws a spell, which only it can cast. Minions it casts must be summoned here.

All-terrain Vestments.rulesText: Bearer has Burrowing, Submerge, and Voidwalk, if it's a minion.

Altar of Malachai.rulesText: Once per game, if you would die, you may sacrifice a minion atop this Altar instead.

Amethyst Core.rulesText: Provides (A) and ① to its controller.

Amulet of Niniane.priority: high when opponent has board presence, good early game tempo
Amulet of Niniane.rulesText: Bearer can't be targeted or damaged by magic.

Ancient Dragon.priority: high when opponent has board presence, late game finisher
Ancient Dragon.rulesText:
Airborne

Tap → Deal 4 damage to each other unit at target location nearby.

Angel Ascendant.rulesText: Has Airborne and +1 power while Warded.

Angel's Egg.rulesText: At the end of each turn, the controller of Angel's Egg's site heals 1 life.

Angry Mob.rulesText: Genesis → Kill target adjacent Unique or Elite minion.

Animist.priority: high for card advantage, good early game tempo
Animist.rulesText:
Tap → Play or draw a site.

You may cast magics in your hand as Spirits with power equal to their cost.

Anui Undine.rulesText:
Submerge
 
Anui Undine has +1 power for each site in her body of water.

Apostles of Thamariel.priority: high for card advantage, good for board development, ETB value on play
Apostles of Thamariel.rulesText: Genesis → Search your top seven spells. You may summon an Angel from among them, then shuffle. The Angel is banished if the Apostles ever leave the realm.

Apply Alkahest.priority: high when opponent has board presence
Apply Alkahest.rulesText: Destroy all minions, artifacts, and auras at target nearby site.

Aquamarine Core.rulesText: Provides (W) and ① to its controller.

Aramos Mercenaries.rulesText: You may discard a random card rather than pay this spell's mana cost.

Arc Lightning.priority: high when opponent has board presence
Arc Lightning.rulesText: Deal 4 damage to target nearby unit.

Arcade of Bones.priority: high when opponent has board presence
Arcade of Bones.rulesText: While in this row, Undead move freely and can't be targeted or damaged by magic.

Arcane Barrage.priority: high when opponent has board presence, good early game tempo
Arcane Barrage.rulesText: Shoot X projectiles in the same direction, one at a time. Each deals 1 damage.

Archangel Gabriel.priority: high for card advantage, late game finisher, ETB value on play
Archangel Gabriel.rulesText:
Airborne, Ward

Genesis -> Choose another allied minion. They draw a spell, which only they can cast.

Archangel Michael.priority: late game finisher, ETB value on play
Archangel Michael.rulesText:
Airborne, Ward

Genesis → Michael takes a step, then strikes all enemies at his location.

Archangel Raphael.priority: late game finisher, ETB value on play
Archangel Raphael.rulesText:
Airborne, Ward

Genesis → Strike or Ward a nearby Avatar.

Archangel Samael.priority: late game finisher, ETB value on play
Archangel Samael.rulesText:
Airborne, Ward

Genesis → Players lose 1 life for each Evil minion they control or in their cemetery.

Archimago.priority: high for card advantage, good early game tempo
Archimago.rulesText:
Tap → Play or draw a site.

Banish three magic spells in your cemetery → Cast a copy of one of them.

Arid Desert.priority: high when opponent has board presence, good early game tempo, ETB value on play
Arid Desert.rulesText: Genesis → Deal 1 damage to each minion atop target nearby site.

Arjaro Exorcist.priority: good early game tempo, ETB value on play
Arjaro Exorcist.rulesText:
Spellcaster

Genesis → Banish target adjacent Demon, Spirit, or aura.

Armageddon.priority: high when opponent has board presence, late game finisher

Army of the Dead.priority: high when opponent has board presence, good for board development, late game finisher
Army of the Dead.rulesText: Whenever this Army moves or takes damage, it leaves a Skeleton token behind.

Askelon Phoenix.priority: high when opponent has board presence, late game finisher
Askelon Phoenix.rulesText:
UPDATED: Airborne

If Askelon Phoenix would take fire damage, it gains +1 power this turn instead.

Asmodeus.priority: high when opponent has board presence, late game finisher
Asmodeus.rulesText:
Stealth

Break Stealth → Destroy everything else here, including this site.

Assimilator Snail.rulesText: Once on your turn, you may banish a dead minion. Assimilator Snail becomes a copy of that minion until your next turn.

Assorted Animals.priority: high for card advantage, good early game tempo
Assorted Animals.rulesText: Search your spellbook for different Beasts with a combined mana cost of X or less, reveal them, and put them in your hand. Shuffle your spellbook.

Astral Alcazar.rulesText: Units can move between this site and any void as if they were adjacent.

Atlantean Fate.priority: late game finisher, ETB value on play
Atlantean Fate.rulesText:
Affected non-Ordinary sites are flooded. They are water sites, only provide Water threshold, and lose all other abilities.

Genesis → Submerge all minions and artifacts atop affected sites.
